subject: New Request: Java Developer – Java
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: MediLink
ROLE: Mid Java Developer
START: 2024-03-20
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Malmö / remote
RATE: To be discussed

The team works primarily with Java, Azure and SQS.

Key requirements:
• Java
• Azure
• SQS

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Ida Fredriksson
Account Manager
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 73 566 78 90
